items.content:
About This Role

We are seeking a Controller to lead our accounting function and ensure the integrity of our financial reporting. You will manage the monthly close process, oversee accounts payable and receivable, and build the financial controls necessary for a company preparing for its next stage of growth.

Reporting to the CFO, you will play a critical role in establishing the financial rigor and compliance frameworks that give leadership, investors, and auditors confidence in our numbers.

Responsibilities

  • Oversee the monthly, quarterly, and annual financial close processes
  • Manage a team of 2-3 accounting staff and oversee accounts payable, receivable, and payroll
  • Ensure compliance with US GAAP and prepare financial statements
  • Manage the annual audit process and relationship with external auditors
  • Implement and maintain internal controls and accounting policies
  • Oversee revenue recognition in compliance with ASC 606 for SaaS contracts

Requirements

  • 7+ years of progressive accounting experience, including 3+ years in a leadership role
  • CPA certification required
  • Strong knowledge of US GAAP, especially ASC 606 revenue recognition
  • Experience with accounting software (NetSuite preferred) and Excel
  • Audit experience (Big 4 or regional firm background preferred)

Nice to Have

  • Experience at a venture-backed SaaS company
  • Familiarity with sales tax compliance (Avalara or similar)
  • Experience preparing for SOC 2 or SOX compliance
